profile.name: Sophia Alemar
profile.title: Graphic designer · Maryland-born · 19
profile.bio: I've always been interested in some sort of art, of course I didn't understand it much when I was a kid but I know that exploring and learning new ways to express myself was something I enjoyed a lot. I origonally apply to major in Graphic Design on a whim, but I found that it's something I've learned to really enjoy now. I know it sounds cheesy, but it's the truth, and it's become a place where I can be both creative and professonal; including my hobbies without burning myself out.

projects.title: Once Upon a Broken Heart Clock
projects.tagline: Mixed-media clock inspired by Stephanie Garber
projects.description: Interactive clock piece inspired by Once Upon a Broken Heart, focused on unlocking your own potential over time.
